name: ruby-multi-json
title: ruby-multi-json
summary: Ruby library to provide easy switching between different JSON backends
description:
Ruby library to provide easy switching between different JSON backends
A Ruby library to provide easy switching between different JSON backends,
including Oj, Yajl, the JSON gem (with C-extensions), the pure-Ruby JSON gem,
and OkJson.
The Debian package dependencies only provide Oj by default. If you need
another backing library, you must install it yourself.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-multi-json because Ruby library to provide easy switching between different JSON backends.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-multi-json as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-multi-json with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-multi-json --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
